---
name: QA feedback
about: Something looks wrong, could be better, or doesn't work
title: ''
labels: qa
assignees: ''
---

**What were you doing?**

**What happened?** (or what didn't happen)

**What did you expect?**

**Where?**
- Page URL:
- Device (phone/desktop/tablet):
- Browser:
- Business name (if relevant):

**Screenshot or screen recording** (drag here or paste)

**How bad is it?**
- [ ] Broken — can't use this feature
- [ ] Wrong — data or behavior is incorrect
- [ ] Confusing — had to think about what to do
- [ ] Polish — looks off but works
- [ ] Idea — would be nice to have
